name: Manaksia Aluminium Company Limited
summary: Manaksia Aluminium Company Limited manufactures and sells aluminum products primarily in India. The company offers aluminum sheets and coils, aluminum flooring sheets, aluminum pattern sheets, aluminum roofing sheets, aluminum closure coils and sheets, aluminum color coated coils, aluminum color coated roofing or building sheets, and aluminum alloy ingots. It exports its products to approximately 20 countries in Europe, North America, the Middle East, Africa, Latin America, and other continents. Manaksia Aluminium Company Limited was incorporated in 2010 and is based in Kolkata, India.
